name: Maple Syrup Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the maple syrup and butter. Cook over medium heat until it reaches 260°F on a candy thermometer.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Pour the mixture over the popped popcorn.
4. Shape into balls. Both pecans and walnuts pair well with maple; feel free to add your favorite.
